title: Interest and penalties
description: Learn about interest and penalties we charge and interest we pay on early or overpaid amounts.

child_links.title: Interest we pay
child_links.description: We pay you interest on certain tax liabilities when you pay early, overpay or there's a delay in us paying your refund.

child_links.description: Find out about the interest we charge on outstanding, underpaid and incorrect reports of tax amounts.

child_links.title: Penalties
child_links.description: Penalties we impose and how we calculate it using a statutory formula or in multiples of a 'penalty unit'.
